name: Denied forklift claim because not on clock in Millcreek Utah?

mainEntity.name: Denied forklift claim because not on clock in Millcreek Utah?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Challenge: Utah presumes on-premises injuries work-related during employment course.** Burden on employer.[3] Key factors: Show advancing business interests; appeal in 30 days with time logs.[3] Off-clock rare denial.
